name: LockOnReset wrapper reset defaults to PowerCycle blocks later host write

name: LockOnReset wrapper reset defaults to PowerCycle rejects stale unlocked host write

name: Failed LockOnReset wrapper powerCycle status FAIL preserves unlocked write

name: Failed LockOnReset wrapper powerCycle status FAIL rejects phantom lock
why: Failed reset output must not lock ranges as if the reset succeeded.

name: setReEncryptRequest policy request values moves state to pending

name: setReEncryptRequest config target request moves state to pending
